source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/11_Audit F-up/240415-17 ISO 갱신심사 & 2,3G MDR 심사 - 3EC/MDR 보완/[2nd response TD by H&abyz] Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (08 March 2024) word/A-TCF-5-156 Test Reports (rev.2).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Summary of compliance test reports for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detector models and WBW880A Wi-Fi transceiver.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by listing applied standards, laboratories, report numbers, issue dates, and compliance results for safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, DQE, transportation, IPX6, RED, IEC 62368-1, and RF testing.
keyPoints: Products are inspected under the quality management system before market placement and tested according to applied standards.
Nemko Korea Co., Ltd., Korea Testing Laboratory, SGS Korea Co., Ltd., and in-house testing are listed as laboratories.
Several summarized test reports state a test result of Compliance.
Laboratory certificate references include ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Certificate for Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. and GLP Compliance statement for Korea Testing Laboratory.

entities.name: A1417MCW
entities.evidence: Model A1417MCW is listed for IEC 60601-1, EN 60601-1-2, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, EN 62220-1-1, and IPX6 testing.

entities.name: A1717MCW
entities.evidence: Model A1717MCW is listed for IEC 60601-1, EN 60601-1-2, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, EN 62220-1-1, transportation environment, and IPX6 testing.

entities.name: F1417MCW
entities.evidence: Model F1417MCW is listed for IEC 60601-1, EN 60601-1-2, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, and EN 62220-1-1 testing.

entities.name: WBW880A
entities.evidence: The Wi-Fi Transceiver RED Test lists model WBW880A.

entities.name: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. is listed as the laboratory for IEC 60601-1, EN 60601-1-2, wireless EMC, RED EMC, IEC 62368-1, and RF tests.

entities.name: Korea Testing Laboratory
entities.evidence: Korea Testing Laboratory is listed as the laboratory for biocompatibility testing.

entities.name: SGS Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: SGS Korea Co., Ltd. is listed as the laboratory for transportation environment and IPX6 tests.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: The EN 62220-1-1 summary lists Laboratory as In-house testing (H&abyz Co., Ltd.).

concepts.name: Basic safety and essential performance
concepts.pageTarget: IEC 60601-1 basic safety and essential performance
concepts.evidence: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance; applied standard IEC 60601-1: 2005 /A1:2012.

concepts.name: Electromagnetic disturbances requirements and tests
concepts.evidence: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1-2: Electromagnetic disturbances – requirements and tests; applied standard EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021.

concepts.name: Wireless EMC testing
concepts.evidence: (Wireless) EMC Test applied standards EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6.

concepts.name: Biocompatibility
concepts.evidence: Biocompatibility applied standards ISO 10993-1:2018, ISO 10993-5: 2009, and ISO 10993-10:2010.

concepts.name: Detective quantum efficiency
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment - Characteristics of digital X-ray imaging devices - Part 1-1: Determination of the detective quantum efficiency - Detectors used in radiographic imaging.

concepts.name: IPX6 enclosure protection
concepts.evidence: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IPX6); applied standard IEC 60529:1989+ A1:1999+A2:2013.

concepts.name: RED Test
concepts.evidence: Wi-Fi Transceiver RED Test lists EMC Test, IEC 62368-1 Test, and RF Test for model WBW880A.

concepts.name: Laboratory accreditation and compliance statements
concepts.pageTarget: Testing laboratory certificates ISO IEC 17025 GLP
concepts.evidence: Certificate for the Laboratory lists Nemko Korea Co., Ltd ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Certificate and Korea Testing Laboratory GLP Compliance statement.

evidence.claim: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW were tested for IEC 60601-1 basic safety and essential performance by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance; Model A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Applied Standard IEC 60601-1: 2005 /A1:2012 (3.1rd, CB Scheme); Report No REP001842; Report Issued Date 2022-11-08; Test result Compliance.
evidence.pageTarget: IEC 60601-1 basic safety and essential performance

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW were tested for EN 60601-1-2 EMC requirements by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. under report NK-22-E-0810.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1-2: Electromagnetic disturbances – requirements and tests; Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Applied Standard EN 60601-1-2:2015 /A1:2021; Report No NK-22-E-0810; Report Issued Date 2022-10-04; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1717MCW was tested for EMC requirements by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. under report NK-22-E-0813.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW; Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; EN 60601-1-2015 /A1:2021; NK-22-E-0813; 2022-10-04; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW have a wireless EMC report REP031070 issued on 2024-03-07.
evidence.evidenceText: (Wireless) EMC Test report; A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6; REP031070; 2024-03-07; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1717MCW has a wireless EMC report REP031071 issued on 2024-03-07.
evidence.evidenceText: (Wireless) EMC Test report; A1717MCW; Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6; REP031071; 2024-03-07; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW deco sheet biocompatibility testing complied with ISO 10993 standards.
evidence.evidenceText: Biocompatibility; A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW (Deco sheet); Korea Testing Laboratory; ISO 10993-1:2018, ISO 10993-5: 2009, ISO 10993-10:2010; 20-007374-01-1; 2020-04-17; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW were evaluated in-house for digital X-ray imaging detector DQE under EN 62220-1-1:2015.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical electrical equipment - Characteristics of digital X-ray imaging devices - Part 1-1: Determination of the detective quantum efficiency - Detectors used in radiographic imaging; Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Laboratory In-house testing (H&abyz Co., Ltd.); Applied Standard EN 62220-1-1:2015; Test Report No. A-TCF-5-116; Issued date 2022-11-21.

evidence.claim: A1717MCW transportation environment testing by SGS Korea Co., Ltd. complied with manufacturer-set conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: Transportation environment test; Applied Standard (conditions set forth by the manufacturer.); Laboratory SGS Korea Co., Ltd.; Model A1717MCW; Issued date 2023-01-12; Test Report No. SGS-R23-0128-EN00; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and A1717MCW IPX6 enclosure protection testing was performed by SGS Korea Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IPX6); A1417MCW; SGS-R22-2398-EN00; 2022-11-14; A1717MCW; SGS-R22-2399-EN00; 2022-11-24; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: WBW880A Wi-Fi Transceiver RED EMC testing complied with EN 301 489 standards.
evidence.evidenceText: RED Test EMC Test; Applied Standard EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Model WBW880A; Test Report No. NK-24-E-0214(REP029530); Test result Compliance.
evidence.pageTarget: Radio Equipment Directive RED EMC testing

evidence.claim: WBW880A IEC 62368-1 testing complied with IEC 62368-1:2018 and EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62368-1 Test; Applied Standard IEC 62368-1:2018 and EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Model WBW880A; Test Report No. REP029530; Test result Compliance.
evidence.pageTarget: IEC 62368-1 audio video information technology equipment safety

evidence.claim: WBW880A RF testing complied with ETSI EN 300 328, ETSI EN 301 893, ETSI EN 300 440, and EN 62311.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Test; Applied Standard ETSI EN 300 328 V2.2.2, ETSI EN 301 893 V2.1.1, ETSI EN 300 440 V2.2.1, EN 62311:2020; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Model WBW880A; Test Report No. NK-24-R-060; Test result Compliance.
evidence.pageTarget: Radio Equipment Directive RED RF testing

evidence.claim: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. is associated with an ISO/IEC 17025:2017 certificate in the document.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.1 Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Certificate.

evidence.claim: Korea Testing Laboratory is associated with a GLP Compliance statement in the document.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.2 Testing Laboratory: Korea Testing Laboratory GLP Compliance statement.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not stated in the source text; a date appears only in the source path context.
Authority signal is FDA in metadata, but FDA is not explicitly present in the source text; source text references CB Scheme and RED instead.
The EMC standard for A1717MCW is shown as EN 60601-1-2015 /A1:2021 in one table, while the section title and summary indicate Part 1-2 electromagnetic disturbances.
Wireless EMC amendment reference for REP031070 is inconsistent: the Test Results table says amendment of NK-22-E-0812, while the Summary section says amendment of NK-22-E-0815.
Several WBW880A RED test report issued dates are shown as '-' and are therefore not available.
